resources.string: DAMN! YOU TRULY ARE JOBLESS\nYOU REACHED THE END
Couldn\'t find a File Manager to open SD card
Long click to check for app updates
Seems like that wasn\'t found on Anilist.
Requires Time Stamps to be Enabled
Make the skip time stamp button disappear after 5 seconds
Long click \"List Editor\" button to reset Auto Update
Autoplay cancelled, no interaction for more than 1 Hour.
Couldn\'t auto select the server, Please try again!
Episode list is empty, Please try again!
No streams available! Try another source.
Auto Update progress has now been reset-ed
Refresh Token : Failed to load saved token
Incognito mode will still ignore progress.
Turn on 18+ content from your Anilist settings
By posting to AniList, you agree to the rules and guidelines of AniList
View and edit all your subscriptions
Cannot install when app is in background
Test if the extensions are working
Test not supported for this extension
No results found. Extension may be broken
Lock the app with a password\n( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)
Passwords do not match or are empty!
Use your fingerprint or face to unlock the app
Enable Forgot Password (hold clear button for 10 seconds)
Show a badge on cards when new episodes are available
Show a green dot on cards for currently airing anime
Route All Your Network Traffic Through a SOCKS5 Proxy
A repository link should look like this: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/username/repo/branch/index.min.json\nOr: username/repo/branch

Warning: Extensions from the repository can run arbitrary code on your device. Only use repositories you trust. 

By adding a repository, you agree to: 

1. Not use the app for viewing or distributing copyrighted content. 
2. Not use the app for any illegal activities. 
3. Not use the app for any activities that violate the terms of service of the content providers. 

The app or it's maintainer are not affiliated in any way with extension providers. The developers are not responsible for any damages caused by the app. 

By adding a repository, you agree to these terms.
Choose what type of activities to show
Settings for the Continue Watching feature
How long to remember the last-used source per show
Show a screenshot of the last frame on the hero card
Logo artwork loads automatically — no API key required
Remove cached logo URLs — they re-fetch on next launch
Clear all cached TMDB logo URLs? They will be re-fetched automatically.
Where logo cache files are saved
External storage is not available on this device
Forget all remembered sources for every show
This will forget the remembered source for every show. Continue?
Choose how the banner at the top of Home looks
Crossfades to the focused card's banner; shows last-watched on launch
No banner — cards start at the very top
Rescue mode active — AniList profile unavailable

1. Scan the QR code with your phone
2. Log in to AniList in the browser
3. After approving, the browser shows a redirect URL — copy everything after #access_token= up to &token_type
4. Paste the token below
Cache folder reset to internal storage
Drag to reorder. Enabled providers are tried in priority order until a stream is found.
Configure built-in HTTP stream sources and their priority
Reset all providers to their defaults?
Use {title} and {episode} as placeholders.\nExample: https://myapi.example.com/stream?title={title}&episode={episode}\nExpected response: JSON with a "url", "stream", or "src" field.
No stream found — all providers exhausted
Choose the dark background style when in dark mode
Normal theme background — no black override
Pure black (#000000) — maximum battery saving on OLED screens
Black background with 3 intense radial glow orbs (top-center, top-right, bottom-left)
Directional gradient fade from the theme color to black
Direction of the gradient fade (applies to Gradient mode only)
Cinematic dark vignette at screen edges in the theme color
Override the theme accent color with a custom color
Swap primary and secondary theme colors
Amount of color blending applied to surfaces (0–20)
Choose the visual style for media cards
Style for the spotlight and continue watching hero cards
Layout for the episode list (list / grid / compact)
Global scale multiplier for the interface (0.5×–2.0×)
Show the horizontal trending scroller on the home screen
Global animation and transition speed multiplier (1×–5×)
Radius of banner blur in pixels (1–50 px)
Blur sampling factor — higher = faster but lower quality (1×–8×)
Hide the red notification indicator dot on the home screen
Animation played on the focused card
Quality, buffer, GPU and decoder settings
Preset configuration for video quality vs performance
Seconds before player controls auto-hide (2–10 s)
Video buffer size in megabytes (16–128 MB)
Use device GPU for video decoding (recommended)
Rendering backend used by the video player
Reduce color banding artifacts in gradients
Interpolate frames for smoother motion on high-refresh displays
Algorithm used to upscale lower-resolution video
Advanced mpv-style key=value options (one per line)
Remember the last-used source per anime across sessions
Automatically sync watch progress to AniList
Mark episodes as watched without a manual confirmation prompt
Minimum watch percentage before marking an episode complete (50–100%)
Automatically update chapter progress to AniList
Display the continue watching section on the home screen
Display planned anime on the home screen
Display personalized recommendations on the home screen
Display trending anime on the home screen
Display popular anime on the home screen
Display recently updated anime on the home screen
Which tab opens when you launch the app
DNS server used for resolving stream URLs
Enter your custom DNS server IP address
Reduce data usage by lowering image quality and prefetch
Automatically update installed extensions when a new version is available
Do not save watch history or update AniList progress
Swipe up/down on the left side of the screen to control brightness
Remove all locally stored watch history
This will permanently delete all your local watch history. Continue?
Remove all locally stored search history
This will permanently delete all your local search history. Continue?
Show browsing cards in landscape or portrait format
Choose which image is shown on browsing cards
The app has crashed. Please restart.
Automatically play the next episode when the current one ends
Choose the image format used in data saver mode
Double tap to seek forward or backward
Display two pages side by side
Exporting requires encryption to be set up
Show brightness and volume sliders in the player
Duration of each seek step in seconds
Duration to skip when tapping the skip button (seconds)
Tap the color swatch to change the subtitle color
Tap the color swatch to change the subtitle window color
Use a proxy for timestamp requests
Use the actual cover art colors for the theme
Percentage of episode that must be watched to count as complete
Wrap images to fill the screen width
AniList is down. Please try again later.
Are you sure you want to ban this user?
Animate banners with Ken Burns effect
Biometrics not available on this device
Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
SaninTV is an anime streaming app that aggregates content from various online sources via extensions.
Install an anime extension from the Extensions settings, then browse or search for anime in the Anime or Discovery tab.
Go to Settings → Extensions and tap "Add Repository" to add an extension repository URL, or install extension APKs directly.
How do I log in to AniList?
Go to Settings → Account and tap the AniList card. You will be redirected to the AniList authorization page.
Watch progress is automatically synced to your AniList or MAL account when Update Progress Automatically is enabled in Anime settings.
Extensions are source plugins that provide anime content from various websites. They are installed separately and can be managed in the Extensions settings.
Warning: Logging may slow down the app
Are you sure you want to logout?
MAL login code challenge not found
Are you sure you want to report this comment?
Rescue mode allows you to use the app with basic functionality when AniList is down.
Skip image loading on metered networks
Subscribe to this anime for notifications
Use original titles instead of English
